# LSMText

**Class**

An input text.

## Declaration

```swift
class LSMText
```

## Overview

An [doc://com.apple.latentsemanticmapping/documentation/LatentSemanticMapping/LSMText] is a mutable, opaque Core Foundation type that represents an input text.

## Creating a Text Object

- **LSMTextCreate(_:_:)**: Creates a new text.

## Adding to the Text

- **LSMTextAddToken(_:_:)**: Adds an arbitrary binary token to the text.
- **LSMTextAddWord(_:_:)**: Adds a word to the text.
- **LSMTextAddWords(_:_:_:_:)**: Breaks a string into words using the specified locale, and adds the words to the text.
- **Parsing Flags**: Options for parsing words to add to the text.

## Getting the Type Identifier

- **LSMTextGetTypeID()**: Returns the Core Foundation type identifier for Latent Semantic Mapping texts.

## Text Classification

- **LSMMap**: A map between a set of categories and related text.
- **LSMResult**: A result of a lookup in a map.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
